title: Customer Progress UX (calibrated progress wired into the quote flow)
description: Wires the six-stage calibrated customer progress display into the Book Now quote flow: a Supercharged-branded CalibratedProgress component over the EXISTING progress-stages driver + progress-calibration/progress-metric routes, plus a public intake/config endpoint exposing the flag to the client. No backend rewrite. Completion follows the real API outcome (success/review/error); reduced-motion supported.

verification.summary: PR #10 verified at head dda4ea1 (retargeted onto post-#9 main; isolated diff = exactly 3 files: intake/config, CalibratedProgress, quote/page): tsc 0; eslint clean; progress-ux stage-mapping + flag tests pass; test:ai 121/121; full 466/466; ai-regression 2/2; next build ✓ (/api/intake/config dynamic); Vercel + regression + Preview green. Flag OFF ⇒ static AnalyzingView path byte-identical.

knownDifferences: CalibratedProgress rebranded to Supercharged (var(--red)) from the operion reference; created a new intake/config endpoint (absent in SC) to expose flags.progressUx to the client. Component owns no progress logic — thin shell over createTimedDriver.

rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 59155d4 (PR #10 merge). OPERION_PROGRESS_UX off ⇒ progressActive is always false ⇒ the static "Analyzing…" flow is byte-identical.
No migration, no env, no flag change.
compatibilityNotes: Customer-facing UI — Supercharged branding preserved. Reuses the progress-stages backend; no rewrite. Flag OPERION_PROGRESS_UX OFF by default.

history.note: Progress UX customer wiring identified as the deferred UX-001 surface downstream (backend + endpoints already present; component + wiring missing).
Implemented + verified on feat/customer-progress-ux (PR #10), stacked on PR #9; Preview green.
Retargeted onto post-#9 main (isolated 3-file diff) and merged to Supercharged main as 59155d4 (head dda4ea1); flag OFF.
